DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CROSS DEFENDANT ARTURO ROVERSO'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT.
Overruled as to the first, second and fifth causes of action and sustained without leave to amend as to the third cause of action. Cross-Complainants adequately pled the first, second and fifth causes of actions. For statute of limitations purposes, the cross-complaint relates back to when the complaint was filed. The interpleader cross-claim is not cognizable because cross-complainants allege ownership of the property. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077
